title: Hash-Based Signature Fundamentals: Security from Minimal Assumptions
description: Understand why hash-based signatures offer the strongest theoretical foundation for post-quantum security. Learn the principles that make hash functions sufficient for digital signatures.
learningObjectives: Explain why hash-based signatures have minimal security assumptions
Understand the relationship between hash function properties and signature security
Compare hash-based approaches to lattice-based signatures
Identify the tradeoffs in hash-based signature design
Describe the historical development of hash-based signatures
